caveat: The planner evaluates every root, reachable SVar ability, and keyword independently and repeatedly peels unknown parameters to expose all such confirmed gaps in one pass. It records the first remaining non-parameter diagnostic per node; another value-level blocker may appear after that diagnostic is fixed, so projected complete-card counts are confirmed-set estimates, not release claims.
